markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and refine Panther's new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Brand Focus:** The brand is shifting from "Detection as Code" to "Autonomous SOC" to align with the March 18 AI co-pilot launch, which expands the Total Addressable Market (TAM) by making the product accessible to less technical SOC analysts.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Competitive Analysis Expansion:** The analysis will be expanded to include direct upstart competitors (Anvilogic, Runreveal, Veaga) and AI-focused rivals (Prophet Security, DropZone) to better identify white space.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Refinement:** The "Detection Engineering" cluster is being reframed to focus on practical application, while "AI SOC" and "Log Management" are confirmed as high-priority areas for ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [**Leadership Transition:** Interim CMO Seema Kumar departs at the end of January; new CMO Shannon King starts February 2nd and will be briefed on the GrowthX engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=3032.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Direction & Brand Positioning

  - [**March 18 AI Co-pilot Launch:** The launch is a key driver for the new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build authority around AI capabilities for the SOC.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**TAM Expansion:** The product will become accessible to less technical SOC analysts, not just Python-proficient security engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**New Brand Focus:** The primary positioning is shifting from "Detection as Code" to **"Autonomous SOC"** to reflect the AI-driven future.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [**Core Content Goal:** Be a helpful resource for security engineers, providing practical solutions to daily job challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [**Distribution Channels:** Content must be optimized for channels where technical users discover information, such as private Discord/Slack, LLMs, and search engines, as many are not active on LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Competitive Analysis & White Space

  - [The initial analysis focused on legacy SIEMs (Splunk) and platform companies (Datadog), identifying white space in cloud-native SIEMs and practitioner-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [**Analysis Expansion:** The analysis will be updated to include two new competitor categories:](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Upstarts (SIEM-focused):** Anvilogic, Runreveal, Veaga](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**AI-focused Rivals:** Prophet Security, DropZone](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will revise the analysis to focus on AI SOC positioning and opportunities against these new competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

### Proposed Content Clusters & Refinements

  - [**1. AI SOC & Practical AI for Security (High Priority)**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Direct support for the March AI launch.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Panther as the AI-enabled SIEM, making expert-level engineering accessible.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Own emerging topics like MCP (Managed Cloud Provider) security, which has low competition.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [**2. Cloud Security Threats & Detection Guides**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Transform existing threat research into SEO-optimized, actionable content.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**Differentiator:** Focus on *how* to detect threats, not just what they are.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**Action:** Katie to review all keywords for technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
  - [**3. Incident Response & SOC Operations**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Directly addresses the expanded SOC analyst audience.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)
      - [**Content Source:** Leverage existing AI-driven content from Jack's podcast.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [**4. SIEM Comparison & Migration (Bottom of Funnel)**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture enterprise buyers researching alternatives to legacy SIEMs like Splunk.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Own comparisons for cloud-native SIEMs.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
      - [**Action:** Panther to share existing competitor campaign landing pages for potential use as CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
  - [**5. Security Data Lake & Architecture**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Highlights Panther's unique, cost-effective architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
      - [**Action:** Incorporate Databricks, as it is a key strategic partner.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2592.0)
  - [**6. Log Management & Data (High Priority)**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A critical, underrated area where Panther can demonstrate deep technical expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Dominate content on difficult but essential topics like schema drift and cost optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)

### Operational Logistics

  - [**Calibration Article:** The topic "How to reduce alert fatigue" was rejected for calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
      - [**Reason:** The topic is too product-centric for a non-product-focused calibration piece.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will propose new topics via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
  - [**Content Approval Flow:**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
      - [**Reviewers:** Katie, Seema (through Jan), Jack, and Michael Baker.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Jack and Michael Baker's review is critical for ensuring technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2946.0)
  - [**CMS Walkthrough:** A 10–15 minute walkthrough of the Framework CMS is required.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2875.0)
      - [**Action:** Ana will coordinate with Katie or the agency Pixel 1.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2875.0)
  - [**Analytics Access:** GrowthX has GA4 access but needs Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will create a ticket to confirm access; Ana will follow up with IT if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2726.0)
      - [Revise competitive analysis to include new upstart and AI-focused competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Propose new calibration article topics via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
      - [Create a ticket to confirm Google Search Console access.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Develop a full content calendar (50+ topics) for next week's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [**Panther:**](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
      - [Share existing competitor campaign landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
      - [Coordinate the Framework CMS walkthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2875.0)
      - [Have Katie review all proposed keywords for technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/HxkxteZPe8sxQGRi1tajRqALeZUxmfdX?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
